headline: 10 Information Technology Stocks Showing Unusual Options Activity In Today's Session
summary: This unusual options alert can help traders track potentially big trading opportunities. Traders often look for circumstances when the market estimation of an option diverges away from its normal worth. Unusual trading activity could push option prices to hyperbolic or underperforming levels.

headline: FTC Orders Broadcom To Cease Monopolistic Conduct

author: Benzinga Insights
headline: Broadcom Insights: Return On Capital Employed
summary: Looking at Q2, Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) earned $1.98 billion, a 7.51% increase from the preceding quarter. Broadcom's sales decreased to $6.61 billion, a 0.68% change since Q1. In Q1, Broadcom brought in $6.66 billion in sales but only earned $1.84 billion.
